title: UI/UX Audit: Web & Mobile Apps Analysis Complete
currentGoal: Create unified design system with color palette, typography, spacing, and component library for both Web and Mobile
completedWork: Audited Web app: Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui components, dark theme, framer-motion animations, comprehensive dashboard and landing page
Audited Mobile app: StyleSheet-based, basic color theme, no component library, Expo Router navigation, basic screens
Identified key gaps: no unified design system, inconsistent components, missing mobile component library, no design tokens, limited accessibility on mobile
nextStep: Create comprehensive design system documentation with Figma specs, color tokens, typography scale, and component library blueprint
decisions: Unified dark theme as primary (consistent with current)
Semantic color tokens for success, warning, error
Component library needed for mobile (matching web shadcn/ui)
notes: Current state: Web has good component foundation but needs design tokens; Mobile lacks component library entirely. Need to create unified system that works across both platforms.
